data.name: Hentai Misaki
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Misaki — a game for true anime erotica fans

Hentai Misaki is an interactive game that combines logic, attention, and a seductive atmosphere. You'll meet the charming and sexy Misaki in her wedding dress, who gradually reveals more as you complete levels.

🔹 Game features:

  • Two mini-games in one level:

    • First — a classic memory game: flip the tiles and find matching pairs.

    • Second — a puzzle of Misaki’s image to complete right after the memory game.

    • Once both are completed, a full spicy image of Misaki is revealed.

  • Plenty of levels to enjoy: 24 levels in each mini-game — 48 exciting stages in total.

  • Progress reveals more: the further you go, the hotter Misaki becomes.

  • Game progression:

    • Achievements for top players.

    • Gallery to view unlocked images.

    • Three difficulty modes: easy, normal, hard — choose your pace.

Hentai Misaki is an adult game that blends puzzles with erotic motivation. Complete levels, unlock new scenes, and enjoy every step with the alluring Misaki.

data.short_description: Hentai Misaki is an adult game where you solve puzzles and match tiles to gradually reveal the seductive bride Misaki. The more levels you complete — the hotter the scenes become!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
